items.title: Study the pattern
items.body:
Workbook lesson 19: To open / To close. Read the sentences, listen, and repeat.

Examples:
• I open I close
• I open the door I close the door
• I open the window I close the window
• I open the room I close the room

items.text: I open the door I close the door

items.prompt: Eu abro a porta Eu fecho a porta
options: door the close I door the open I
You open the door I close the door
I open the door I close the door
I open the door I close the door 3.

items.text: I open the window I close the window

items.prompt: Eu abro a janela Eu fecho a janela
options: I open the window I close the window 3.
window the close I window the open I
I open the window I close the window
You open the window I close the window

items.answer: I open the room I close the room
I open the house I close the house
